# Preisser Solutions Full Site Map

This file intentionally summarizes the public site instead of duplicating every page. Use the canonical HTML pages and sitemap for the full crawlable source of truth.

## Entity

Preisser Solutions is a Hays, Kansas company owned by Tyler Preisser. It helps local businesses get more calls, bookings, and customers through websites, local SEO, Google Business Profile optimization, Google Ads, review systems, social media marketing, lead tracking, and AI automation.

## Contact

- Website: https://preissersolutions.com/
- Email: sales@preissersolutions.com
- Phone: +1-620-352-3296
- Locality: Hays, KS 67601
- Service area: Hays, Ellis County, and Northwest Kansas by appointment, client-site visits, and remote work.

## Primary Offer

Get a Free Hays Visibility Audit: https://preissersolutions.com/contact?offer=hays-visibility-audit

Audit scope:

- Google visibility review
- Website conversion review
- Review gap check
- Competitor comparison
- Call/form/follow-up review
- 30-day action plan

## Guardrails

- No ranking, Google Maps, AI Overview, ChatGPT, Perplexity, revenue, lead, or ad-performance guarantees.
- No fake reviews, fake ratings, fake offices, fake addresses, fake partnerships, fake sponsorships, fake press, or keyword-stuffed business names.
- No fake traffic, proxy clicks, click farms, fake engagement, CTR manipulation, or fake map interactions.
- No review incentives, rating requests, keyword coaching, or selective solicitation.
- Use real proof only when available and permitted.

- Sitemap: https://preissersolutions.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://preissersolutions.com/robots.txt
- OpenAPI: https://preissersolutions.com/openapi.json
- Agent card: https://preissersolutions.com/.well-known/agent-card.json
